title: K-Brands Moss Pole (2 Pack, 122 cm/48 In/ 4 ft) - Bendable Monstera Plant Support - Cheese Plant Support Pole Sticks - Moss Poles for Climbing Plants - Plant Stakes Indoor with Ties
features: Sturdy and easy to use: Our 2-pack 122 cm/48 In/4 ft of bendable moss poles are made with durable materials that provide reliable support for your climbing plants. The easy-to-use design allows for quick and hassle-free installation

Easy to bend into shape: Our moss poles can be easily bent into a variety of shapes, including hearts, arches, and even snake-like designs. This makes it easy to create a unique and personalized look for your climbing plants, while providing them with the support they need to thrive.

Perfect for monstera and other climbers: Our bendable moss poles set provides reliable support for a variety of climbing plants, including monstera, pothos, and philodendron. As your plants grow, they will naturally latch onto the poles and climb upwards, creating a stunning display of greenery in your home. With moss poles, you can watch your plant grow and thrive in a safe and supportive environment.
Eco-friendly and clean: Our bendable moss poles are made of high-quality coconut palm fibers, a renewable and sustainable resource that is both breathable and non-shedding.

Comes with Plant Ties: The set comes with 304cm of sturdy plant ties that make it easy to attach your climbing plants to the poles. The ties are flexible and durable, so you can adjust them as your plants grow and they won't damage delicate stems.

product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Garden › Gardening › Raised Beds & Support Structures › Plant Cages & Supports
product_details_tab_data.Recommended Uses: supporting climbing plants indoors, promoting healthy growth of Monstera and other climbers
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: CAUTION: Handle with care to avoid injury from the sharp pointed end. Always insert and remove the stake with the pointed end facing down. Avoid exposure to extreme temperatures and chemicals to prevent degradation of the coconut palm fiber material. Always ensure the stake is securely anchored to prevent it from becoming dislodged and causing harm.
